info.name: Qubaati System - Full Flow Check
info.description: End-to-end verification of the Qubaati activity flow: setup data, AI generation/refinement, review/approval, assignment, student submission, AI evaluation/feedback, return/reopen, and the extra availability/history endpoints. No security is enabled, so teacherId/studentId/etc. are passed explicitly. IDs are saved into collection variables by test scripts.

exec: // runSuffix and role credentials are set by the collection-level pre-request.
const c = Array.isArray(json) ? json.filter(x => x.name === 'Grade 6 Physics Explorers').pop() : null;

body.raw: {"title": "Engineering World", "category": "STEM", "description": "A world where students solve engineering and physics challenges."}

exec: const cw = Array.isArray(json) ? json.filter(x => x.title === 'Engineering World').pop() : null;

body.raw: {"name": "Problem Solving", "description": "Ability to solve quantitative and logical problems.", "skillType": "PROBLEM_SOLVING"}

exec: const s = Array.isArray(json) ? json.filter(x => x.name === 'Problem Solving').pop() : null;

item.name: am - Teacher Enrolls Faisal Into Classroom

request.description: Teacher (Basic Auth) enrolls the student into their own classroom. classroomId/studentId are resource targets in the body; the acting teacher comes from Basic Auth.

item.name: am - Teacher Enrolls Lina Into Classroom

request.description: Teacher enrolls the second child into the classroom (body-based).

body.raw: {"title": "Teacher Owned Seed Activity", "description": "Owned by the teacher (Student 1 ownership seed).", "type": "QUIZ", "status": "PENDING_REVIEW", "difficulty": "EASY", "maxScore": 10, "skillId": {{skillId}}}

exec: const a = Array.isArray(json) ? json.filter(x => x.title === 'Teacher Owned Seed Activity').pop() : null;
pm.test('teacher-owned activity exists with createdByTeacherId', () => { pm.expect(a).to.not.be.null; pm.expect(a.createdByTeacherId).to.eql(Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('teacherId'))); });
// Guard (Issue 3): a manually created activity must NOT be APPROVED directly — it enters the review queue.
const a = Array.isArray(json) ? json.filter(x => x.title === 'Teacher Owned Seed Activity').pop() : null;
pm.test('activity is APPROVED after review', () => pm.expect(a && a.status).to.eql('APPROVED'));

if (json.configured === false) { console.log('AI NOT configured (status=' + json.status + '). Explicit AI generate/refine/feedback return a clear 400 (no fabricated fallback). The AI activity-generation chain (folders 02-08) needs OPENAI_API_KEY to run end-to-end; the manual activity flow in folder 09 needs no key.'); }

body.raw: {"topic":"Speed, Distance, and Time for Grade 6","description":"A short quiz about the relationship between speed, distance, and time.","type":"QUIZ","difficulty":"EASY","questionCount":3,"maxScore":10}

exec: const j = (() => { try { return pm.response.json(); } catch (e) { return null; } })();

const noPlaceholder = (blob) => { const s = (blob || '').toLowerCase(); pm.expect(s, 'must not contain placeholder/template text').to.not.include('an accurate statement about'); pm.expect(s).to.not.include('a common misconception about'); pm.expect(s).to.not.include('a statement unrelated to'); };
pm.test('NO placeholder/template content (real AI output)', () => noPlaceholder(JSON.stringify(j)));

pm.test('description is clean plain text', () => { pm.expect(j.description).to.be.a('string'); pm.expect(j.description).to.not.include('\n'); pm.expect(j.description).to.not.include('**'); pm.expect(j.description).to.not.include('Here is'); });

if (j.questions && j.questions.length) { const q = j.questions[0]; pm.collectionVariables.set('questionId', q.id); const opts = q.options || []; const correct = opts.find(o => o.isCorrect) || opts[0]; if (correct) pm.collectionVariables.set('optionId', correct.id); }

pm.test('AI unavailable -> clear failure, NOT fallback content', () => { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(400); pm.expect((j && j.message ? j.message : '').toLowerCase()).to.match(/not configured|openai_api_key|ai provider|generation failed|invalid json|placeholder/); });
pm.test('error body has NO placeholder/template content', () => noPlaceholder(JSON.stringify(j)));

if (aiConfigured) { pm.test('configured AI must generate (check model/account)', () => { throw new Error('AI health=READY but generate returned ' + pm.response.code + '; verify the configured model is valid for the account.'); }); }
else { console.log('Generate correctly failed: no OPENAI_API_KEY. Set it to generate and run folders 03-08.'); }
const j = (() => { try { return pm.response.json(); } catch (e) { return null; } })();

pm.test('refined questions relate to the instruction (rockets/space topic)', () => { const t = JSON.stringify(j.questions).toLowerCase(); pm.expect(t).to.match(/rocket|missile|launch|space|orbit|propuls|thrust|spacecraft|astronaut|nasa|fuel|booster|aerospace|payload|ignition|gravity/); });

pm.test('no fallback/template phrase', () => { const t = ((j.description||'') + ' ' + JSON.stringify(j.questions)).toLowerCase(); pm.expect(t).to.not.include('total questions'); pm.expect(t).to.not.include('placeholder'); });
pm.test('refine without an AI provider returns a clear error (no silent fallback)', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([424,500,502,503]));

item.name: ab - Get Activity Details (teacher, after generate)
am - Generic Questions List Is Student-Safe

exec: pm.test('generic question DTO hides correctAnswer', () => json.forEach(q => pm.expect(q).to.not.have.property('correctAnswer')));

item.name: am - Generic Options List Is Student-Safe

exec: pm.test('generic option DTO hides isCorrect', () => json.forEach(o => pm.expect(o).to.not.have.property('isCorrect')));
pm.test('assigning a non-APPROVED (PENDING_REVIEW) activity fails with 400', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
pm.test('review queue contains the activity', () => pm.expect(json.some(a => String(a.id) === String(id))).to.be.true);
pm.test('review history contains APPROVED', () => pm.expect(json.some(r => r.decision === 'APPROVED')).to.be.true);

item.name: am - Assign Approved Activity to Student

exec: pm.test('saved answer status is SAVED (not SUBMITTED)', () => pm.expect(json[0].status).to.eql('SAVED'));
pm.test('message asks to answer all questions', () => pm.expect(json.message).to.include('answer all questions'));
pm.test('message lists missing question ids', () => pm.expect(json.message).to.include('Missing question ids'));
pm.test('all saved answers have status SAVED', () => json.forEach(a => pm.expect(a.status).to.eql('SAVED')));

pm.test('feedback provenance is honest', () => { if (json.feedbackSource === 'SYSTEM') { pm.expect(json.aiFeedback).to.include('Total questions'); } else { pm.expect(json.aiFeedback).to.not.include('Total questions:'); } });

item.name: am - Evaluate Submission (EN) [manual re-grade - NOT required in normal flow]

exec: pm.test('aiFeedback is non-empty real AI text', () => pm.expect(json.aiFeedback).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty);
pm.test('feedbackSource is AI when provider configured', () => pm.expect(json.feedbackSource).to.be.oneOf(['AI','SYSTEM']));

item.name: am - Generate Feedback (AR, student) [manual - regenerates audience feedback, not required]

exec: pm.test('is an array (may be empty after AI grading)', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json()).to.be.an('array'));

item.name: am - Add Teacher Feedback (no status change)

body.raw: {"teacherFeedback": "Great work. Your solution is correct, but remember to show the formula next time.", "submissionId": {{submissionId}}}
{"teacherFeedback": "Please review the formula and try again", "submissionId": {{submissionId}}}

exec: pm.test('reopen does NOT expose correctAnswer', () => json.questions.forEach(q => pm.expect(q).to.not.have.property('correctAnswer')));
pm.test('reopen does NOT expose isCorrect', () => json.questions.forEach(q => (q.options||[]).forEach(o => pm.expect(o).to.not.have.property('isCorrect'))));
pm.test('answers saved again as SAVED', () => json.forEach(a => pm.expect(a.status).to.eql('SAVED')));

body.raw: {"title": "S2 Short Answer Activity", "description": "A short-answer activity for AI-assisted grading.", "type": "QUIZ", "status": "PENDING_REVIEW", "difficulty": "EASY", "maxScore": 10, "skillId": {{skillId}}}

exec: const a = Array.isArray(json) ? json.filter(x => x.title === 'S2 Short Answer Activity').pop() : null;
// Guard (Issue 3): manual create is PENDING_REVIEW, never APPROVED directly.

body.raw: {"content": "In one sentence, explain why the sky looks blue.", "type": "SHORT_ANSWER", "points": 10, "difficulty": "EASY", "correctAnswer": "Because sunlight scatters off air molecules and blue light scatters the most (Rayleigh scattering).", "activityId": {{s2ActivityId}}}

request.description: ADMIN/DEBUG ONLY. /questions is an admin-only generic endpoint and is NOT part of the normal teacher flow (teachers get questions via AI activity generation/refine, which produce multiple-choice). This admin seed exists solely to exercise SHORT_ANSWER AI text grading, which AI generation does not yet emit.

exec: pm.test('student got an ACTIVITY_ASSIGNED notification', () => pm.expect(json.some(n => n.type === 'ACTIVITY_ASSIGNED')).to.eql(true));

item.name: am - Assign Activity to Classroom (notify all)

exec: pm.test('attempt never exposes correct answers', () => json.questions.forEach(q => { pm.expect(q).to.not.have.property('correctAnswer'); (q.options||[]).forEach(o => pm.expect(o).to.not.have.property('isCorrect')); }));

body.raw: {"answers": [{"questionId": {{s2QuestionId}}, "answerText": "The sky looks blue because the air scatters blue light more than the other colors."}], "submissionId": {{s2SubmissionId}}}

exec: pm.test('graded with a numeric score and feedback', () => { pm.expect(json.status).to.eql('GRADED'); pm.expect(json.score).to.be.a('number'); pm.expect(json.aiFeedback).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
pm.test('no correct answers leak in result', () => pm.expect(json).to.not.have.property('correctAnswer'));
pm.test('feedbackSource is AI or SYSTEM (never a faked AI label)', () => pm.expect(json.feedbackSource).to.be.oneOf(['AI','SYSTEM']));
pm.test('student got an ACTIVITY_GRADED notification', () => pm.expect(json.some(n => n.type === 'ACTIVITY_GRADED')).to.eql(true));
pm.test('submission re-scored from the manual grade', () => { pm.expect(json.status).to.eql('GRADED'); pm.expect(json.score).to.eql(7); });

item.name: am - Verify Total Points After Manual Grade

exec: pm.test('totalPoints rose by the final score (7) via delta accounting (no double-count)', () => pm.expect(json.totalPoints).to.eql(Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('s2PointsPreSubmit')) + 7));

item.name: am - Verify Student Skills No Duplicates + Activity Skill

exec: pm.test('no duplicate StudentSkill rows per skill id', () => { const ids = json.map(s => s.skillId); pm.expect(new Set(ids).size).to.eql(ids.length); });
pm.test('the activity real skill was updated (not the first PROBLEM_SOLVING fallback)', () => pm.expect(json.some(s => s.skillId === Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('skillId')))).to.eql(true));

pm.test('returns submissions with summary fields (no answers)', () => { pm.expect(json).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; const s = json[0]; pm.expect(s).to.have.property('studentName'); pm.expect(s).to.have.property('activityMaxScore'); pm.expect(s).to.not.have.property('answers'); });

pm.test('teacher details include per-answer grading + correct answer', () => { pm.expect(json.answers).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; const a = json.answers[0]; pm.expect(a.earnedPoints).to.eql(7); pm.expect(a.status).to.eql('PARTIAL'); pm.expect(a.correctAnswer).to.be.a('string'); });
pm.test('student got a TEACHER_FEEDBACK notification', () => pm.expect(json.some(n => n.type === 'TEACHER_FEEDBACK')).to.eql(true));
pm.test('student got an ACTIVITY_RETURNED notification', () => pm.expect(json.some(n => n.type === 'ACTIVITY_RETURNED')).to.eql(true));
pm.test('manual grading a RETURNED submission is rejected (400)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));

item.name: am - Verify Total Points After Return

exec: pm.test('returning the submission removed its counted points (back to pre-submit)', () => pm.expect(json.totalPoints).to.eql(Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('s2PointsPreSubmit'))));

pm.test('reopened to IN_PROGRESS, still student-safe', () => { pm.expect(json.submissionStatus).to.eql('IN_PROGRESS'); json.questions.forEach(q => pm.expect(q).to.not.have.property('correctAnswer')); });
pm.test('student got a SUBMISSION_REOPENED notification', () => pm.expect(json.some(n => n.type === 'SUBMISSION_REOPENED')).to.eql(true));

item.name: am - Seed Overdue Assignment (CRUD, past dueDate)

exec: pm.test('student got an ACTIVITY_OVERDUE notification', () => pm.expect(json.some(n => n.type === 'ACTIVITY_OVERDUE')).to.eql(true));
// Due in ~12h so the due-soon window (?hours=24) catches it.
pm.test('student got an ACTIVITY_DUE_SOON notification', () => pm.expect(json.some(n => n.type === 'ACTIVITY_DUE_SOON')).to.eql(true));

pm.test('dashboard reports the activity counts', () => { ['assignedCount','inProgressCount','submittedCount','gradedCount','returnedCount','overdueCount','dueSoonCount'].forEach(k => pm.expect(json[k], k).to.be.a('number')); });

pm.test('dashboard lists are present and leak no correct answers', () => { pm.expect(json.dueSoonAssignments).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(json.returnedSubmissions).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(json.recentGradedSubmissions).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(JSON.stringify(json)).to.not.contain('correctAnswer'); });
const pick = t => { const m = json.find(x => x.title === t); return m ? m.id : null; };
const m1 = pick('Story Mission 1 - The Rescue');
const m2 = pick('Story Mission 2 - The Bridge');
const m3 = pick('Story Mission 3 - The Signal');
const m4 = pick('Story Mission 4 - The Solution');
pm.test('all four default missions exist', () => { pm.expect(m1).to.not.be.null; pm.expect(m2).to.not.be.null; pm.expect(m3).to.not.be.null; pm.expect(m4).to.not.be.null; });

body.raw: {"steps": [{"stepOrder": 1, "scenario": "Step 1: A child is stuck on a ledge. What do you do first?", "choices": [{"content": "Assess the situation and call for backup", "scoreImpact": 20, "nextStepOrder": 2}, {"content": "Rush in immediately without a plan", "scoreImpact": 5, "nextStepOrder": 2}]}, {"stepOrder": 2, "scenario": "Step 2: You reach the ledge. How do you bring them down safely?", "choices": [{"content": "Secure a rope and guide them calmly", "scoreImpact": 30, "nextStepOrder": null}, {"content": "Pull them quickly without securing anything", "scoreImpact": 10, "nextStepOrder": null}]}], "missionId": {{mission1Id}}}

exec: pm.test('teacher view exposes scoreImpact + choiceKey', () => { const c = json.steps[0].choices[0]; pm.expect(c).to.have.property('scoreImpact'); pm.expect(c).to.have.property('choiceKey'); });

body.raw: {"steps": [{"stepOrder": 1, "scenario": "Step 1: The bridge needs a strong base. Which material?", "choices": [{"content": "Test materials before choosing", "scoreImpact": 20, "nextStepOrder": 2}, {"content": "Guess and hope it holds", "scoreImpact": 5, "nextStepOrder": 2}]}, {"stepOrder": 2, "scenario": "Step 2: The bridge is built. How do you check it is safe?", "choices": [{"content": "Run a careful load test", "scoreImpact": 30, "nextStepOrder": null}, {"content": "Skip testing to save time", "scoreImpact": 10, "nextStepOrder": null}]}], "missionId": {{mission2Id}}}

{"steps": [{"stepOrder": 1, "scenario": "Step 1: A faint signal appears. What is your first move?", "choices": [{"content": "Triangulate the signal source", "scoreImpact": 20, "nextStepOrder": 2}, {"content": "Ignore it for now", "scoreImpact": 5, "nextStepOrder": 2}]}, {"stepOrder": 2, "scenario": "Step 2: You found the source. How do you respond?", "choices": [{"content": "Send a clear, calm reply", "scoreImpact": 30, "nextStepOrder": null}, {"content": "Send a confusing burst", "scoreImpact": 10, "nextStepOrder": null}]}], "missionId": {{mission3Id}}}

{"steps": [{"stepOrder": 1, "scenario": "Step 1: A tricky problem appears. How do you start?", "choices": [{"content": "Break it into smaller parts", "scoreImpact": 20, "nextStepOrder": 2}, {"content": "Try a random fix", "scoreImpact": 5, "nextStepOrder": 2}]}, {"stepOrder": 2, "scenario": "Step 2: You have a plan. How do you finish?", "choices": [{"content": "Check the result step by step", "scoreImpact": 30, "nextStepOrder": null}, {"content": "Submit without checking", "scoreImpact": 10, "nextStepOrder": null}]}], "missionId": {{mission4Id}}}

exec: pm.test('steps come back ordered with choices', () => { pm.expect(json.steps).to.have.lengthOf(2); pm.expect(json.steps[0].choices.length).to.be.above(0); });
pm.test('admin steps endpoint STILL exposes scoreImpact', () => { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.steps[0].choices[0]).to.have.property('scoreImpact'); });
pm.test('not unlocked before completing 4 default missions', () => pm.expect(json.personalizedMissionsUnlocked).to.eql(false));
pm.test('no grade field is used to filter', () => pm.expect(json).to.not.have.property('grade'));

item.name: ah - Get Career World Default Missions

exec: pm.test('returns a list (default missions only)', () => pm.expect(json).to.be.an('array'));
pm.test('no AI_GENERATED missions leak here', () => json.forEach(m => pm.expect(m.source).to.not.eql('AI_GENERATED')));

item.name: ah - Legacy Generate Blocked Before Unlock (expect 400)

exec: pm.test('legacy generate is locked before 4 default completions', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
pm.test('student step never exposes scoreImpact', () => json.currentStep.choices.forEach(c => pm.expect(c).to.not.have.property('scoreImpact')));

item.name: ah - Complete Too Early Fails (not ready)

exec: pm.test('completing before the final step is blocked (400)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
pm.test('not complete yet; next step returned', () => { pm.expect(json.missionCompleteReady).to.eql(false); pm.expect(json.nextStep.stepOrder).to.eql(2); });
pm.test('next step choices hide scoreImpact', () => json.nextStep.choices.forEach(c => pm.expect(c).to.not.have.property('scoreImpact')));

body.raw: {"choiceId": {{choiceId}}, "reason": "Re-submitting a step-1 choice while on step 2.", "sessionId": {{sessionId}}}

exec: pm.test('a choice from a different step is rejected (400)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
pm.test('final step: complete-ready, no next step', () => { pm.expect(json.missionCompleteReady).to.eql(true); pm.expect(json.nextStep).to.be.null; });
pm.test('never more than 2 active generated missions', () => { const active = gen.filter(m => m.active && !m.completed); pm.expect(active.length).to.be.at.most(2); });
// After unlock the student already holds 2 active generated missions (the cap), so the legacy
// endpoint must refuse — proving it shares the MAX_ACTIVE_GENERATED rule with the official flow.
pm.test('legacy generate refused at active cap', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
pm.test('error message mentions personalized cap', () => pm.expect((pm.response.json().message || '').toLowerCase()).to.include('active personalized'));
pm.test('generated mission is owned by this student', () => pm.expect(json.source).to.eql('AI_GENERATED'));

item.name: ah - Decide Generated Step (loop until complete)

body.raw: {"choiceId": {{genChoiceId}}, "reason": "Working through the generated mission step by step.", "sessionId": {{genSessionId}}}

exec: pm.test('mission complete-ready after deciding all steps', () => pm.expect(json.missionCompleteReady).to.eql(true));
postman.setNextRequest('ah - Decide Generated Step (loop until complete)');
pm.test('mission completed within the step guard (no runaway)', () => pm.expect(guard).to.be.below(25));

item.name: ah - Regenerate Generated Mission In Place

exec: pm.test('still an active AI_GENERATED mission', () => { pm.expect(json.source).to.eql('AI_GENERATED'); pm.expect(json.active).to.eql(true); });
pm.test('a MISSION_COMPLETED notification exists', () => pm.expect(json.some(n => n.type === 'MISSION_COMPLETED')).to.eql(true));
pm.test('teacher dashboard shows completed mission sessions after Student 3 flow', () => { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.missionSummary.completedMissionSessionsCount).to.be.above(0); });
pm.test('insight has summary + source (openai or fallback)', () => { pm.expect(json.summary).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(json.source).to.be.oneOf(['openai','fallback']); });
pm.test('teacher owns at least the seeded activity', () => pm.expect(json).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty);
pm.test('all returned are APPROVED', () => json.forEach(a => pm.expect(a.status).to.eql('APPROVED')));

item.name: ab - Get Activities Review Queue (status filter)

exec: pm.test('learning profile combines skills + learning style + missions', () => { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('skills'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('weakSkills'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('completedMissionSessionsCount'); });
pm.test('learning profile reflects completed missions', () => { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.completedMissionSessionsCount).to.be.above(0); });

pm.test('a child shows mission progress (completedMissionsCount + totalPoints > 0)', () => { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.children.some(c => c.completedMissionsCount > 0)).to.eql(true); pm.expect(j.children.some(c => c.totalPoints > 0)).to.eql(true); });

pm.test('an automatic row exists with server-assigned changedAt', () => { const auto = json.find(r => (r.reason || '').indexOf('automatically') !== -1); pm.expect(auto, 'auto skill-progress row').to.not.be.undefined; pm.expect(auto.changedAt).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
pm.test('any history row is well-formed (changedAt present)', () => { (json || []).forEach(r => pm.expect(r.changedAt, 'changedAt').to.be.a('string').and.not.empty); });
pm.test('message points to official flow', () => pm.expect((pm.response.json().message || '').toLowerCase()).to.include('disabled'));
pm.test('message points to official flow', () => pm.expect((pm.response.json().message || '').toLowerCase()).to.include('disabled'));
pm.test('message points to official flow', () => pm.expect((pm.response.json().message || '').toLowerCase()).to.include('disabled'));
pm.test('message points to official flow', () => pm.expect((pm.response.json().message || '').toLowerCase()).to.include('disabled'));

item.name: am - Create Activity With status=APPROVED (guard test)
am - Verify Activity Not APPROVED (status guarded)

exec: const a = Array.isArray(json) ? json.filter(x => x.title === title).pop() : null;
pm.test('client-supplied APPROVED was ignored -> PENDING_REVIEW', () => pm.expect(a && a.status).to.eql('PENDING_REVIEW'));
const parentPlus = Array.isArray(json) ? json.filter(p => p.code === 'PARENT_PLUS').pop() : null;
const teacherPro = Array.isArray(json) ? json.filter(p => p.code === 'TEACHER_PRO').pop() : null;
if (json.hasActivePlan === false) { pm.test('parent is on the FREE plan by default', () => pm.expect(json.hasActivePlan).to.be.false); }
else { console.log('Parent has an ACTIVE paid plan — paid-path test will assert success.'); }

item.name: ab - Create 3rd Child Under Free Parent Fails

exec: const j = (() => { try { return pm.response.json(); } catch (e) { return null; } })();
pm.test('parent has a paid plan — 3rd child allowed (200/201)', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200,201]));
pm.test('free parent: 3rd child blocked with 400', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(400));
pm.test('error mentions the child limit / free plan / upgrade', () => pm.expect((j && j.message ? j.message : '').toLowerCase()).to.match(/child|children|free plan|limit|upgrade/));
